case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT vs. TRAILOR, VIRGAL et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAILOR, VIRGAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAILOR, VIRGAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 GEARY STREET, #508, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $2,490.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,490.50, LEASE FORFEITED, AS TO MONETARY, AND ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS, PLEASE SEE STIPU- LATED JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
